delivery.raw: 主に対面（全開講回数の過半数）、一部オンライン

rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
A 15-week English Conversation/Communication Course with a speaking midterm & final exam at the end.
English Conversation is a practical course in which students practice skills to express themselves in a foreign language and negotiate meaning in weekly communicative conversational settings.
Students will have weekly themes/topics to prepare, read, write, think and talk about in class and as homework.
This class should be fun and easy to participate in as you improve your English conversation/communication ability discussing weekly topics in groups to show us what you know about your culture while learning more about other cultures.
aims:
English Conversation II is a basic university English communication course taught by a native English speaker.
The aim is that students improve general communicative competence and learn to apply this productively and receptively in authentic spoken interactions.
This is an opportunity to communicate in groups using the English you have learned in junior and senior high school.
Have fun improving your English conversation/communication ability discussing weekly topics about everyday activities as well worldwide events and cultures.
goals: Speaking & listening in English to develop basic conversational communication ability
Reading, writing & speaking in English to develop practical grammar ability
Speaking in pairs & groups to improve English pronunciation & fluency
Reading, writing & speaking about customs & culture to improve intercultural understanding

textbooks:
Materials will be posted on the KU moodle website [https://moodle.kochi-u.ac.jp/2026/] or given out in class.
All students were given the Eikaiwa Handbook reference in Eikaiwa I class.
prereq:
Successful completion of Eikaiwa I
[The course is taught in English at a Post Elementary level. It is assumed that students have some basic English communication skills, so students must be ready to try to function in English and improve on their basic conversation and listening skills. Most first-year students at Kochi University have elementary English ability in speaking/conversation].
prep:
Students are expected to practice English skills and prepare for all classes. Practice outside of class is essential.
Students should bring & keep a folder of all class materials. The FOLDER & an English-Japanese DICTIONARY are NECESSARY for every class.
Students are expected to prepare & review class material & new vocabulary for each class.
At least 30~45 minutes are needed weekly to review, practice & prepare for each class at home.
To improve your English ability to a higher level, 3~4 hours weekly of study at home is recommended.
Try practicing English at home or outside of class for at least 5~10 minutes daily to make an improvement.
teachers: ◎ フェビアン ポーラ ダイアン

extra.label: 区分1
extra.text: 平成20年度以降入学生／令和６年度以降入学生

extra.label: 区分2
extra.text: 共通教育）初年次科目／国際コミュニケーション科目基軸英語

extra.label: 履修における注意点
extra.text: １年次に必修。１外国語（英語）履修上限年間10単位。卒業にはⅠとⅡ両方が必要。

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－省令で定める科目：外国語コミュニケーション

extra.label: 【テーマ（英語）】(IN ENGLISH)
extra.text:
Enjoy communicating in English.
Give students an opportunity to communicate in groups in English.
Keep a conversation/discussion going using weekly topics as well as good pronunciation & grammar.

人類の文化・社会・自然に関する知識

情報に関するリテラシー

extra.label:
履修に係わる注意事項
【NOTES ON CLASS ENROLLMENT】
extra.text:
It is very important to ATTEND class regularly (maximum 3 absences), especially the 1st lesson introduction.
Students are expected to ACTIVELY PARTICIPATE in every class.
Class size is usually 25~30 students with students working in small groups or pairs.
[This is a practical course where students practice English-speaking skills, learn about features of English conversation and improve their listening and pronunciation face-to-face in a physical classroom].

extra.label: 成績評価に関する補足
extra.text:
60% In-class work: Group discussion/Effort/Participation
Preparation: Homework/Vocabulary Notebook or folder/(Moodle)
(MAXIMUM ***3 absences)
40% EXAMS: 20% Midterm EXAM (Group CONVERSATION)
20% Final EXAM (Group CONVERSATION)

extra.label: 教員の実務経験の有無
extra.text:
有
教員の実務経験との関連
Have worked as a teacher; teaching in kindergarten, elementary school NPO summer programs, junior & senior high school, vocational schools, cram schools, language schools & university. Before teaching, I worked for a small company in public relations/marketing & advertising. Over the years have volunteered or worked in/with NPO groups.

extra.text:
講義形式が中心
口頭での質疑やディスカッションを含む
授業中や授業時間外のグループワークを含む
その他
Some classes will meet online or on demand on moodle
